501, PLAINTIFFS' SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT, TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 8/30/18, IS RULED ON AS FOLLOWS: CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S OBJECTION TO THE CONTINUANCE IS OVERRULED. CONTINUED TO 9/27/18. "AT THE FIRST STEP [OF ANTI-SLAPP ANALYSIS], THE MOVING DEFENDANT BEARS THE BURDEN OF IDENTIFYING ALL ALLEGATIONS OF PROTECTED ACTIVITY, & THE CLAIMS FOR RELIEF SUPPORTED BY THEM." BARAL V. SCHNITT (2016) 1 CAL.5TH 376. MOVING PARTY CONFUSINGLY IN ITS OVERSIZED BRIEF REPEATEDLY REFERS TO "CAUSES OF ACTION" ARISING OF PROTECTED ACTIVITY AND FAILS TO CLEARLY IDENTIFY THE CLAIMS SUBJECT TO THIS MOTION. THEREFORE, BY 9/10/18 MOVING PARTY IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF IN TABLE FORMAT. THE TABLES MAY BE ORGANIZED BY CAUSES OF ACTION SINCE MEMORANDUMS OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES ARE SO ORGANIZED. 1ST TABLE: 1ST COLUMN "CLAIMS ARISING OUT OF PROTECTED ACTIVITY (QUOTE AND LIST ALL PARAGRAPHS CONSTITUTING A CLAIM); 2ND COLUMN "OPPOSING PARTY'S RESPONSE." 2ND TABLE: 1ST COLUMN "CLAIMS NOT ARISING OUT OF PROTECTED ACTIVITY," IF ANY; 2ND COLUMN "OPPOSING PARTY'S RESPONSE." FOR DISTINCTION BETWEEN CAUSES OF ACTION AND CLAIMS PARTIES TO REFER TO BARAL. BY 9/24/18 OPPOSING PARTY TO SUBMIT A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF RESPONDING IN THE TABLE FORMAT. IN THE "OPPOSING PARTY'S RESPONSE" OPPOSING PARTY TO INDICATE CLEARLY IF IT IS ADMITTED OR DENIED THAT A PARTICULAR CLAIM ARISES OUT OF PROTECTED ACTIVITY. IF IT IS ADMITTED, OPPOSING PARTY SHALL LIST ALL EVIDENCE PERTINENT TO THE SECOND PRONG ON SUCH CLAIM. OPPOSING PARTY MAY ADD TO THE LIST OF CLAIMS NOT ARISING OUT OF PROTECTED ACTIVITY IN THE 2ND TABLE (IF SUCH CLAIMS HAVE NOT BEEN LISTED BY THE MOVING PARTY IN THE 1ST TABLE). OPPOSING PARTY IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE TABBED COURTESY COPIES OF EXHIBITS BY 9/24/18. OPPOSING PARTY MAY RETRIEVE UNTABBED COURTESY COPIES DELIVERED TO DEPT. 501 AT 9:30 AM ON 8/30/18. FURTHER, ANY PLEADINGS SUBMITTED BY COUNSEL ARE TO CONFORM TO THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES.
